<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check if any gray squares were collected
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Count gray squares
gray_squares = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 8]
print(f"Gray squares remaining: {len(gray_squares)}")

# Check player position
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print(f"Player at: {n['boundary'][0]}")

# List all gray squares and their centers
print("\nGray squares:")
for n in gray_squares:
    center_id = n['children'][0]
    center = nodes[center_id]
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: center_color={center['color']}, pos={n['boundary'][0]}")

# Check yellow objects count
yellow_count = sum(1 for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y')
print(f"\nYellow objects: {yellow_count}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
